description_long: This is a large, multi-story chalet-style house built into a steep hillside, featuring a prominent wooden structure with deep overhanging eaves and a wide, sloped roof. The front facade is dominated by expansive balconies on each level, supported by vertical posts, and a large, rectangular swimming pool elevated on stilts. The house is set on a landscaped green slope, with a driveway and stone retaining walls visible on one side. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide panoramic views and natural light, especially on the pool-facing side. The rear and side elevations are partially embedded into the hillside, with the terrain dropping sharply away from the structure.
description: A multi-story chalet-style house with wide balconies, a sloped roof, and an elevated swimming pool, built into a steep hillside with large glass windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the house, three levels of balconies, and the prominent swimming pool extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep slope, the pool's elevation on stilts, and the driveway with stone retaining walls.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by the hillside, with the roof and upper balcony visible above the terrain.
description_view_3: Back angled view showing the glass facade, balconies, and the pool, with the house embedded into the slope.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding doors, mostly aligned with balconies
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a set of steps, a covered porch, and a wide wooden door beneath the overhanging roof, with decorative balcony railings above.
